debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

proof:
by
  ext x; constructor
  · intro hx; by_contra h; exact h2 ⟨x, hx, h⟩
  · intro h; rw [h]; exact h1
